title: True-Resume +10M Outcome
body: New true-resume +10M @ LR=1e-4 campaign completed on all 4 seeds.
Aggregate vs baseline 10M: fall_mean 0.1667 -> 0.0000, fall_worst 0.3333 -> 0.0000, vx_median 0.1284 -> 0.1005.
Aggregate vs mixed +2M continuation: fall_mean 0.3333 -> 0.0000, vx_median 0.2085 -> 0.1005.
Weak-seed recovery: s3 fall_rate 0.3333 -> 0.0000 and vx_rmse 0.1842 -> 0.1002; s4 fall_rate 0.3333 -> 0.0000 and vx_rmse 0.1502 -> 0.0942.
